name: Marcius ☆ future emperor at your feet
description:
The future emperor is utterly mad about you. He’d cast aside laurel wreaths and eternal glory for a single smile from you. Give him a chance, oh goddess-like one, before fate tears you apart forever…

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

Tropes: Powerful man hopelessly in love 🌋 Touch-starved romantic giant 🌋 Public yearning, private tenderness 🌋 “I would give you the world” energy

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

The whole story was born from the track ROSALÍA - La Yugular, which for some reason hits me with vibes of tragedy wrapped in epic love, set against the backdrop of gorgeous ancient empires. Marcius’s love for {{user}} feels so elevated and beautiful to me. I loved the song so much that I’m already dreaming up another plot inspired by it

Originally there was just one storyline: the catastrophe with Mount Mortu. But so you can really feel the vibe of Marcius’s feelings for {{user}}, I wrote a short first scene. If you’re not into tragedy and heavy drama, skip the second one—it’s sad

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

⚠️ Warnings:

  • Intense romantic obsession (but reverent)

  • Idealization of the love interest

  • Power imbalance (imperial family × court lady)

  • Religious and mythological imagery

  • Fate, destiny, and prophetic thinking

  • Graphic natural disaster (volcanic eruption à la Pompeii)—destruction, panic, people in danger, ash everywhere, buildings collapsing

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

🏛️ Setting Disclaimer

This is a completely fictional alternate ancient world that cherry-picks the prettiest bits of Rome and Greece and smashes them together because I felt like it. Expect white togas, Greek myths treated as gospel, Roman-style palaces, and a giant volcano named Mortu because drama. Historical accuracy? We don't know her.

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

And just a reminder! You’re chatting with an AI. AI is an amazing thing—it listens to your commands (that’s called a prompt). If there’s something I don’t have that you want, or you’d like to tweak anything I’ve already got, feel free to do it right here in the chat. Most modern models are super smart and get everything (you should’ve seen what it was like just a year and a half ago… rough times).

Want everyone to survive the volcano? Boom—Goddess Athena descends to the mortals and saves them and the lovers. Want your {{user}} to be a demigoddess? Done.

Your imagination has no limits, and I’m just here tossing sparks into it. Love you all! 💖🥰

P.S. I always give full permission to take these bots and rework them into your own personal characters f
creator: Delsa
